content.en:
"I should belong to a Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor now!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Moreover, he is not the kind of Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor who has just been promoted, but belongs to the top Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and his strength is much stronger than before.

What's more, he has a great adult-level forbidden body, even if he fights multiple top fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestors alone, he is not afraid at all, and he can even save his life in the hands of ordinary sixfold Heavenly Dao ancestors.

In addition, he has just been promoted to Dao Ancestor, and his strength will definitely increase in a short period of time.

For example, casually cultivating a Great Thousand Dao Technique, cultivating Dao Ancestor level exercises, and so on.

In short, as long as he was given a little more time, he could easily break through to the Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor realm.

Meanwhile.

In the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, many True Ancestors have broken into the realm of Dao Ancestors.

There are no rules and restrictions, as long as the True Ancestors are sure that they will be promoted to Dao Ancestors, they can be promoted.

Although after the Heavenly Emperor Palace's plans again and again, many True Ancestors in the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm fell, there were still many True Ancestors who had reached the promotion standard.

However, some True Ancestors were successfully promoted, and some True Ancestors failed to be promoted.

---------------

Terran.

After a period of migration, the Terrans basically settled in a completely new territory, which was a territory that belonged entirely to the Terrans.

Moreover, the human race also gave birth to several Dao ancestors.

After all, not everyone wants to be promoted to the top true ancestor, the strongest true ancestor, and the invincible true ancestor, many people don't have any resources, and their talent is just like that, after reaching the peak of the Great Dao cultivation, they start to try to merge with the Dao.

In such a situation, the human race will naturally give birth to a few lucky people, so as to succeed in one fell swoop.

And with the passage of time, there will inevitably be more and more Dao Ancestors of the human race.

However, Ye Tian has very high requirements for the Nine Extremes Legion, and if he can't reach the level of the strongest Dao Ancestor, don't try to promote the Dao Ancestor.

The strongest Dao Ancestor is his minimum requirement for those genius Dao Ancestors of the Nine Extremes Legion, if someone is promoted to an invincible Dao Ancestor and then tries to break through to the Dao Ancestor, it will naturally be better, but that is too difficult.

In a flash, a thousand years have passed.

The Xuanxu Ancient Realm had already been initially stabilized, and a large number of ownerless territories had also been divided among the forces one by one.

And because many domain boundary fragments were fused into the primeval continents by the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, many sects also transferred from the relic space to the primeval continent of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and recruited geniuses for the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

The Xuanxu Ancient Realm also gradually had a trace of the atmosphere of the domain realm, and even developed towards the domain realm.

In addition, the Xuanxu Ancient Realm also continued the division of power in the vast sea realm, dividing the forces from the first heaven to the nine heavens, if it did not meet the standard of the first heaven power, it could not occupy the territory, and could only be limited to the starry sky continent and some stars and worlds.

Those indigenous forces in the Daoshan Realm basically belonged to the Dual Heaven and Triple Heaven forces, the Star Horn Beast clan was divided into the Fifth Heaven Force, and the Forbidden Hall was also divided into the Five Heavens Force.

It's a pity that none of the Dao Mountain Realm Origin Forces are currently divided into the Sixfold Heaven Forces, because the Dao Mountain Realm Origin Forces are currently a Sixfold Heaven Dao Ancestor.

Of course.

Those forces in the vast sea realm are basically integrated into the Daoshan realm, and they can't be regarded as the forces of the Divine Heaven realm, and everyone is not separated from each other.

this day.

The Void Shock, in an area located in the center of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, a group of palaces came out of the turbulence of time and space, and the shock caused was so amazing that many Dao Ancestors crossed the Divine Sense to explore.

"Today, the Heavenly Emperor Palace was born!"

"Today, the Heavenly Emperor Palace was born!"

"Today, the Heavenly Emperor Palace was born!"

The voices of the three palace masters, the Blue Dragon Palace Lord, the True Martial Palace Lord, and the White Tiger Palace Lord, filled the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

At this moment, all the forces knew about the birth of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

At this time, the Heavenly Emperor Palace also began to show part of its strength, lest other forces seek death to provoke the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

Rumble!!!!

The three palace masters released the aura that belonged to the half-step domain ancestor one after another, and the terrifying power far exceeded that of the invincible Dao Ancestor, making all the Dao Ancestors frightened.

Secondly, one after another emperors stood around the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and their invincible figures seemed to stand in time and space, with dozens of figures, and such a terrifying number made countless forces stunned.

This means that the Heavenly Emperor Palace has at least dozens of Invincible Dao Ancestors, and the three Nine Heavens forces are at most a few Invincible Dao Ancestors, and the number of Invincible Dao Ancestors in Black Wind Mountain is not clear, but it will not be too many.

After all, the Invincible Dao Ancestor is not so easy to break through, and if a Dao Ancestor wants to elevate his Dao to the extreme, so as to sublimate into the Invincible Dao Ancestor realm, it must be extremely difficult.

Secondly, the Heavenly Army of the Heavenly Emperor Palace has appeared!

The real Heavenly Army of the Heavenly Emperor Palace is composed of Dao Ancestors, with the First Heaven to the Third Heavenly Dao Ancestor forming soldiers, the Fourth Heavenly Dao Ancestor serving as the squad leader, the Sixth Heavenly Dao Ancestor serving as the regiment leader, and the strongest Dao Ancestors serving as the commander of the first army.

And the Celestial Army is a general term, not a legion.

For example, the Heavenly Army shown this time is ten legions, namely the White Tiger Legion, which is subordinate to the White Tiger Palace Lord and is controlled and managed by more than a dozen Supreme Dao Ancestors, the Blue Dragon Legion, which is subordinate to the Blue Dragon Palace Lord and is also controlled and managed by more than a dozen Supreme Dao Ancestors, and the True Martial Legion, which is subordinate to the True Martial Palace Lord, and is also controlled and managed by more than a dozen Supreme Dao Ancestors.

The other seven legions are the Vermilion Bird Legion, the Gluttonous Legion, the Tiger Legion, the Xuangui Legion, the Dragon Roar Legion, the Golden Crow Legion, and the Killing Legion.

Each legion has 100,000 people, representing 100,000 Dao Ancestors, and ten legions represent having 1 million Dao Ancestors.

Seeing so many Dao Ancestors, no one was not shocked, even Ye Tiandu's pupils shrank, and he realized the strength of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

"No wonder the Heavenly Emperor Palace is not panicked at all, it keeps killing other forces, and it is not afraid at all, it turns out that the strength of the Heavenly Emperor Palace has reached this level, no wonder when the vast sea realm, no force dares to provoke the Heavenly Emperor Palace. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Now, although the vast sea ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace is not there, but with the strength of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, no one must dare to provoke the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

Of course, the prestige of the Heavenly Emperor Palace must be much weaker than before.

In addition, so many True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors were killed in the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and many forces were also very annoyed, and they couldn't show it on the surface, but secretly it was estimated that they hated each one by one, and maybe they would take revenge on the Heavenly Emperor Palace one day.

After the Heavenly Emperor Palace showed its strength, it didn't make any big moves, just announced a heavenly rule.

All the Nine Heavenly Forces need to offer some resources to the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and geniuses anywhere in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm can choose to join the Reserve Army and Genius Military Camp of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

This request has angered many forces!
